project_state_summary: NullForge has AI Gate v0.2.1 PATCH-2 active on main with trusted-base validation and Reference CI as the separate scientific authority. Internal collaboration now spans human and AI contributors across Notion, Google Drive and GitHub, while the one-way publication boundary remains mandatory.
current_task_summary: Add a sanitized public collaboration-provenance document, record it in repository state and changelog, and keep private workspace URLs, identifiers, roster details and raw transcripts out of GitHub.
must_not_change: AI Gate workflow, validator, configuration, schema, or test runner
Reference CI authority, DSP behavior, scientific baselines, or evidence-classification semantics
public information boundary, private workspace separation, or protected implementation paths
deployment configuration, Netlify behavior, or canonical release state
rollback_plan: Close the pull request without merge if the attribution model exposes internal information or misstates project authority. After merge, revert only the collaboration documentation and its state/changelog entries while preserving AI Gate, Reference CI, scientific evidence and publication-boundary history.
